# Fast Piggie — Load and Display Progress

**Goal:**
On app start, load saved progress for the player and display the top score for Fast Piggie on its game card in the main game selection screen.

**Instructions:**

- Ensure progress is loaded from app/progress/progressManager.js at startup.
- Update app/components/gameCard.js and app/interface.js to fetch and display the top score for Fast Piggie.
- If needed, update app/progress/progressManager.js to support this.
- Update or add tests to verify progress is loaded and displayed correctly.

**Verification:**

- Restart the app: Confirm top score is loaded and shown on the Fast Piggie game card.
- All tests pass with 100% function coverage.
